summary: Completed comprehensive full system bug check for The Doggy Company Pet Life Operating System. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend navigation and critical flows verified working. Key finding: Mira AI is functioning as designed but follows a conversational 7-step flow that asks clarifying questions before giving product recommendations - this is BY DESIGN in the system prompt, not a bug.

issues: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop - minor code quality issue

frontend_tests.member_login: PASS - Login with dipali@clubconcierge.in works, redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.dashboard: PASS - Shows user Dipali with pet Mojo, 100% Pet Soul, 4 pets
frontend_tests.pet_not_found: PASS - Graceful error handling, shows 'Pet Not Found' message

mira_ai_behavior_analysis.finding: Mira AI is WORKING AS DESIGNED - follows 7-step conversational flow
mira_ai_behavior_analysis.user_reported_issue: Mira asks 'What date would you like it delivered?' instead of suggesting products
mira_ai_behavior_analysis.actual_behavior: Mira asks clarifying questions like 'Is this for Lola, or for one of the others?' before recommending products
mira_ai_behavior_analysis.root_cause: This is BY DESIGN in the system prompt (Section 12: UNIVERSAL SERVICE FLOW). The prompt explicitly states: 'STEP 1 — Intent Anchoring (NO QUESTIONS)' followed by 'STEP 2 — Clarify (ONE QUESTION AT A TIME)'
mira_ai_behavior_analysis.system_prompt_reference: Lines 1488-1526 in mira_routes.py define the mandatory 7-step flow
mira_ai_behavior_analysis.recommendation: If user wants DIRECT product recommendations without questions, the system prompt needs to be modified to skip the clarification steps for product requests

service_desk_ai_status.summary: WORKING - Returns summary (or 'No messages found' if no messages to summarize)

action_items: OPTIONAL: If user wants Mira to give DIRECT product recommendations without asking clarifying questions, modify the system prompt in mira_routes.py (lines 1488-1526) to skip the clarification steps for product-related requests
MINOR: Fix React key prop warning in AdoptPage.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: Mira AI system prompt is very comprehensive (1700+ lines) and follows a strict 7-step conversational flow - this is intentional design, not a bug
Service Desk AI endpoints are working correctly
Pet profile page handles missing pets gracefully with 'Pet Not Found' message
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs and frontend flows verified working. Mira AI conversational behavior is BY DESIGN in the system prompt. If user wants direct product recommendations, the system prompt needs modification. Service Desk has two-step authentication. Dashboard shows user Dipali with 4 pets (Mojo, Lola, Mystique, Luna).
